name: Red Snapper Veracruz Style
recipeIngredient: 1 Pickled Jalapeno Pepper, rinsed, seeded and cut into strips (Optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use large Red Snapper or other fish fillets cut into 6 serving pieces.
2. Slice the pimento-stuffed olives.
3. Rinse, seed and cut the pickled Jalapeno Pepper into strips (Optional).
4. Combine the flour, salt, pepper, oil, onion, garlic, tomato puree, sliced pimentos, water, lime juice, jalapeno, sugar, cinnamon, cloves, and bay leaf in a bowl.
5. Mix well to coat the fish fillets evenly.
6. Place the coated fish fillets into a serving dish or pan.
7. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
8. Before serving, heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
9. Pan-fry the coated fish fillets until golden brown on each side.
10. Serve garnished with buttered toast.
